name: temporal lobe region volumes
description: Quantitative assessment of temporal lobe subregions for neurodegenerative and seizure disorder evaluation.

attributes.description: Volume of left temporal lobe, clinically relevant for memory and language functions.

attributes.description: Volume of right temporal lobe, clinically relevant for memory and language functions.

attributes.description: Volume of left hippocampus, clinically relevant for memory and seizure disorders.

attributes.description: Volume of right hippocampus, clinically relevant for memory and seizure disorders.

attributes.description: Volume of left entorhinal cortex, clinically relevant for early Alzheimer's disease detection.

attributes.description: Volume of right entorhinal cortex, clinically relevant for early Alzheimer's disease detection.
